goal: Search Gmail for AliExpress delivery update emails, extract package details and delivery status from each, consolidate into an HTML summary table, email the summary to the user, then mark emails as read and label them 'shopping'.

config.description: Sender address for AliExpress delivery notifications
Keywords to filter delivery update emails by subject or body
Email address to send the summary to
Subject line for the summary email
Gmail search query to find AliExpress delivery emails
Maximum number of emails to retrieve
Gmail label to apply to processed emails

invariants: Only emails from the configured AliExpress sender address are processed
Each email is marked as read and labeled after processing
The summary email is sent only after all extraction is complete
required_outcomes: An HTML summary table with package number, products, and delivery status is emailed to the recipient
All processed AliExpress delivery emails are marked as read
All processed AliExpress delivery emails are labeled with the shopping label

steps.summary: Search Gmail for AliExpress delivery update emails from the known sender address, retrieving full email content for extraction
Filter emails to only those containing delivery update or shipment keywords in subject or body

transform.description: Keep only emails whose subject or body contains delivery-related keywords

steps.summary: Extract package number, list of products, and delivery summary (status and estimated delivery date) from each AliExpress delivery email

generate.instruction: For each email in the delivery_emails array, analyze the email body and subject to extract: 1) The package/tracking number, 2) A list of product names included in the shipment, 3) The current delivery status (e.g., 'Shipped', 'In Transit', 'Out for Delivery', 'Delivered'), 4) The estimated delivery date if available. Also preserve the email id for downstream processing. If a field cannot be found, use 'N/A'.
generate.reason: AliExpress delivery emails have varied HTML layouts and unstructured content requiring semantic reasoning to identify package numbers, product names, and delivery status from free-form text.

outputs.name: deliveries
outputs.description: One entry per delivery email with extracted details

email_id.description: Gmail message ID for downstream labeling/marking

products.description: Comma-separated list of product names in the shipment

delivery_status.description: Current delivery status (Shipped, In Transit, Out for Delivery, Delivered, etc.)

estimated_delivery_date.description: Estimated delivery date if available, otherwise N/A

steps.summary: Compose an HTML email body with a brief introductory message and an HTML summary table of all AliExpress delivery updates

generate.instruction: Create a professional HTML email body. Start with a brief greeting and introductory sentence like 'Here is a summary of your latest AliExpress delivery updates:'. Then create an HTML table with the following columns: Package Number, Products, Delivery Status, Estimated Delivery Date. Style the table with borders, a colored header row (e.g., light blue background), padding, and clean professional formatting. Populate the table rows from the deliveries array in extracted_deliveries. If there are no deliveries, show a message saying 'No AliExpress delivery updates found.' End with a brief closing line.
generate.reason: Composing a styled HTML email body with a formatted table from structured data requires free-form HTML generation with conditional content and professional styling — no template structure is available.

outputs.name: html_body
outputs.description: Complete HTML email body with summary table

steps.summary: Send the AliExpress delivery summary email to the user
Mark each delivery email as read and apply the shopping label

do.summary: Mark the email as read and add the shopping label

meta.note: AliExpress emails have varied HTML formats; extraction accuracy depends on email content structure
